---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement for sources, ranking, output, or developer experience
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What limitation are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Why It Helps

Explain the practical benefit to users or maintainers.

## Additional Context

Include links, examples, or related papers if relevant.
